message: Version 1.0.18 improves Smart Mic listening, compact card editing, and shared preview cleanup.
releaseNotes: Smart Mic now stays active while speech is detected and stops only after 2 seconds of no additional speech or input.
Background noise and filler fragments are filtered so they do not overwrite reminder text or keep the mic alive.
The compact card text placeholder now expands and contracts with typed content, with double-tap manual text editing.
Double-tapping the calendar opens the full Edit schedule & location panel for manual date, time, address, and location edits.
Embedded shared-file previews now hide legacy placeholder titles when the sender leaves the title blank.
